title: Ocean Lily Pad Village
description: Adds villages floating on giant lily pads to ocean biomes.
body:
Ocean Lily Pad Village adds a new type of village to your world: settlements that float on giant lily pads in ocean biomes.

![Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2373671b8a66237b0cc730bac3939f7181b543fc.jpeg)

Each lily pad hosts a villager house or profession building, and multiple pads generate close together, forming unique floating communities on the open sea.

![Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c023ef565c4df2e9027e07b113e424fba8897b6.jpeg)

In addition to the profession buildings, some lily pads feature markets, watchtowers, and other unique structures.

![Market](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37c25524d3fe56eef3465aec6fe7e1af0c6c0f8.jpeg)

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
